summary.zh: 使用等宽数字与垂直滚动稳定展示数值变化。
summary.en: Show changing values with tabular figures and stable vertical digit movement.

definition.zh: 数字滚动或递增到目标值。
definition.en: Numeric glyphs translate or interpolate until the display reaches an updated value.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 用稳定的等宽数字滚动或计数到新值，突出数值变化方向和幅度。
purpose.en: Roll or count with stable tabular digits to emphasize the direction and magnitude of a value change.

frequency.zh: 适合低到中频指标更新；高速实时数据应批量更新或直接替换。
frequency.en: Use for low- to medium-frequency metric updates; batch or replace high-rate live data directly.

trigger.zh: 由已确认的新数值触发，并根据增减方向选择滚动方向。
trigger.en: Trigger from a confirmed new value, choosing roll direction from increase or decrease.

enterExit.zh: 变化位数滚动到目标，未变化位保持稳定；初始加载直接显示完整值。
enterExit.en: Roll changed digits to their targets while unchanged digits remain stable, showing the full initial value immediately.

interruptibility.zh: 连续更新合并到最新值，并从当前显示数值和速度继续。
interruptibility.en: Coalesce successive updates toward the latest value from the current displayed value and velocity.

gestureRules.zh: 无需手势；数值控件的增减按钮提供键盘和长按规则。
gestureRules.en: No gesture is required; numeric increment controls provide keyboard and hold behavior separately.

reducedMotion.zh: 立即替换数值，使用静态颜色或箭头标明增减。
reducedMotion.en: Replace the value immediately and indicate direction through static color or an arrow.

reviewNotes.zh: 辅助技术只宣布最终值和变化含义。
reviewNotes.en: Announce only the final value and change meaning to assistive technology.
